notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez steals (2) 2nd base. Angel Martínez to 3rd. Angel Martínez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Carter Jensen.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Starling Marte doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan. Lane Thomas scores. Fielding error by center fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Starling Marte doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan. Lane Thomas scores. Fielding error by center fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Juan Brito.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez hits a grand slam (1) to right center field. Austin Hedges scores. Brayan Rocchio scores. Steven Kwan scores.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo singles on a line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas.

notableEvents.label: Chase DeLauter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chase DeLauter grounds into a double play, second baseman Jonathan India to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Chase DeLauter out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Michael Massey GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Michael Massey grounds into a double play, second baseman Juan Brito to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Jonathan India out at 2nd. Michael Massey out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Starling Marte doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Steven Kwan. Lane Thomas scores. Fielding error by center fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Juan Brito.
